message:
refactor(witness): extract handler helpers and add message deduplication (gt-mjfcr)

Extract smaller functions from high-complexity handlers to reduce cyclomatic
complexity and improve readability:

- HandlePolecatDone: extract handlePolecatDonePendingMR, handlePolecatDoneNoMR,
  notifyRefineryMergeReady
- HandleMerged: extract handleMergedCleanupStatus
- DetectZombiePolecats: extract detectZombieLiveSession,
  detectZombieDeadSession, isZombieState, handleZombieCleanup

Add MessageDeduplicator for idempotent message handling — prevents duplicate
processing if witness restarts and re-reads its mailbox.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
